title: Duplicate and out-of-order PaymentAction handling
description: State machine must be idempotent: receiving the same PaymentAction twice must not cause double-sends or panics. If a message arrives for an unknown session_id (peer reconnected, we lost state), send a PaymentAction::Unknown response. Add Unknown variant to PaymentAction.
close_reason: PaymentAction::Unknown { reason } added; serde tag 'unknown' confirmed by test; session_id enables idempotency checking in state machine
